Organizing Resources

Full library →
guide

EFF: Surveillance Self-Defense

Electronic Frontier Foundation's step-by-step guides on digital security for activists, journalists, and everyday people.

securityprivacysurveillance
guide

Security in a Box

Digital security tools and tactics for human rights defenders — covers encryption, secure comms, and safe browsing.

securityprivacyencryption
tool

FOSS Alternatives (AlternativeTo)

Searchable directory of free and open-source alternatives to proprietary software.

fosssoftwareprivacy
tool

Access Now: Digital Security Helpline

Free direct digital security assistance for civil society, activists, and journalists under threat.

All resources →
archive

Appropedia

Sustainability wiki with thousands of articles on permaculture, urban farming, water systems, and appropriate technology.

permaculturetechnologysustainabilitywiki
guide

Homesteaders of America

Guides on small-scale farming, food preservation, animal husbandry, and land stewardship.

farmingfood-preservationanimals
guide

Seed Savers Exchange

Guides on seed saving, seed storage, and preserving heirloom varieties. Includes a seed library network.
